productDisplayName: Nike Men's Tennis Classic White Shoe
description: Created for clay courts, the tennis Class AC ND shoe for men is a fabulous pair of leather footwear you can ever own. Stylish to the hilt, it looks great when teamed with jeans and t-shirts for that cool, casual look.Upper Suede leather upper with a synthetic leather toe box, heel cup and lace system for style, durability and comfort nike swoosh wrap around in synthetic leather for style and enhnaced support to the midfoot and back foot Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabric collar for in-step comfort and breathability Textured durable rubber toe box foxing for enhanced forefoot protection Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection and cushioning Mildly padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for maximum grip and traction even on loose soil Shoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
